steps.title: Set up equations from percentage statements
steps.content:
From A is 375% of B: $A = 3.75B$
From A is 0.600% of C: $A = 0.00600C$

steps.title: Equate the expressions and isolate C
Simplify the ratio to find p
steps.content:
Evaluate $\frac{3.75}{0.00600}$:
$$\frac{3.75}{0.00600} = \frac{37500}{60} = 625$$
So $C = 625B$. Since $C$ is $p$ percent of $B$, we write $C = \frac{p}{100}B$. Therefore $\frac{p}{100} = 625$, and $p = 62500$.
